Extensions.File:
# Configures default user profile registry hive for new account inheritance. $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue' Start-Transcript -Path "$env:TEMP\DefaultUser_Transcript.log" -Append -Force | Out-Null
function Set-RegSafe { param([string]$Path, [string]$Name, $Value, [string]$Type = 'DWord') try { if (-not (Test-Path $Path)) { New-Item -Path (Split-Path $Path) -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Out-Null } Set-ItemProperty -LiteralPath $Path -Name $Name -Value $Value -Type $Type -Force -EA Stop } catch { $regType = switch ($Type) { 'DWord'{'REG_DWORD'} 'String'{'REG_SZ'} default{'REG_DWORD'} } $val = if ($Type -eq 'String') { "`"$Value`"" } else { $Value } reg.exe add "`"$Path`"" /v "`"$Name`"" /t $regType /d $val /f 2>&1 | Out-Null } }
$p = 'HKU:\DefaultUser' Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsCopilot" 'TurnOffWindowsCopilot' 1 Remove-ItemProperty "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" 'OneDriveSetup' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\GameDVR" 'AppCaptureEnabled' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Control Panel\Keyboard" 'InitialKeyboardIndicators' '2' 'String' Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\TaskbarDeveloperSettings" 'TaskbarEndTask' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'Hidden' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'HideFileExt' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'AutoCheckSelect' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'LaunchTo' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CabinetState" 'FullPath' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Search" 'SearchboxTaskbarMode' 3 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'ShowTaskViewButton' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'TaskbarDa' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" 'TaskbarMn' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\OOBE" 'PrivacyConsentStatus' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer" 'DisableEdgeDesktopShortcutCreation' 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\RunOnce" 'UnattendedSetup' 'powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\UserOnce.ps1"' 'String'
$hide = @('{5399e694-6ce5-4d6c-8fce-1d8870fdcba0}','{b4bfcc3a-db2c-424c-b029-7fe99a87c641}','{a8cdff1c-4878-43be-b5fd-f8091c1c60d0}', '{374de290-123f-4565-9164-39c4925e467b}','{e88865ea-0e1c-4e20-9aa6-edcd0212c87c}','{f874310e-b6b7-47dc-bc84-b9e6b38f5903}', '{1cf1260c-4dd0-4ebb-811f-33c572699fde}','{f02c1a0d-be21-4350-88b0-7367fc96ef3c}','{3add1653-eb32-4cb0-bbd7-dfa0abb5acca}') foreach ($clsid in $hide) { Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\ClassicStartMenu" $clsid 1 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\NewStartPanel" $clsid 1 } Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\ClassicStartMenu" '{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\ClassicStartMenu" '{20d04fe0-3aea-1069-a2d8-08002b30309d}' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\NewStartPanel" '{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}' 0 Set-RegSafe "$p\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\HideDesktopIcons\NewStartPanel" '{20d04fe0-3aea-1069-a2d8-08002b30309d}' 0 Stop-Transcript | Out-Null

# Applies per-user registry configurations and refreshes shell on first logon. $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue' Start-Transcript -Path "$env:TEMP\UserOnce_Transcript.log" -Append -Force | Out-Null
Get-AppxPackage -Name 'Microsoft.Windows.Ai.Copilot.Provider' -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-AppxPackage -EA SilentlyContinue
function Set-RegSafe { param([string]$Path, [string]$Name, $Value, [string]$Type = 'DWord') try { if (-not (Test-Path $Path)) { New-Item -Path (Split-Path $Path) -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Out-Null } Set-ItemProperty -LiteralPath $Path -Name $Name -Value $Value -Type $Type -Force -EA Stop } catch {} }
Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsCopilot' 'TurnOffWindowsCopilot' 1 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'Hidden' 1 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'HideFileExt' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'LaunchTo' 1 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CabinetState' 'FullPath' 1 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Search' 'BingSearchEnabled' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Search' 'CortanaConsent' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'ShowTaskViewButton' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'TaskbarDa' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced' 'TaskbarMn' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Feeds' 'ShellFeedsTaskbarViewMode' 2 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\AdvertisingInfo' 'Enabled' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Privacy' 'TailoredExperiencesWithDiagnosticDataEnabled' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\GameDVR' 'AppCaptureEnabled' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\System\GameConfigStore' 'GameDVR_Enabled' 0 Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Accessibility\StickyKeys' 'Flags' '506' 'String' Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Accessibility\ToggleKeys' 'Flags' '58' 'String' Set-RegSafe 'HKCU:\Control Panel\Accessibility\FilterKeys' 'Flags' '122' 'String'
# Refresh shell safely without terminating explorer.exe try { $shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $shell.RefreshMenu() } catch {} Stop-Transcript | Out-Null
